briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的太空產業對於美國SpaceX正在開發的Starship火箭未來表現產生了日益增長的懷疑。這一消息反映了中國在太空競賽中的焦慮，特別是對於美國技術的競爭力和可靠性的擔憂。這些疑慮可能影響中國在太空探索和技術發展上的策略與投資方向。
briefing.background: 隨著太空探索的商業化和國際競爭的加劇，各國對於太空技術的發展愈加重視。SpaceX的Starship被視為全球最強大的火箭，旨在實現人類登陸火星等長期目標。中國在過去幾年中加大了對太空計劃的投入，試圖縮小與美國的差距。中國的太空計劃不僅包括載人航天和探月任務，還涉及衛星技術和太空站建設，這些都與國家安全和經濟發展密切相關。
briefing.analysis: 中國對於Starship的懷疑反映了其在太空領域的競爭壓力。隨著SpaceX在商業航天領域的成功，中國可能會感受到技術落後的威脅，這可能促使其加速自主技術的研發和創新。此外，這種懷疑也可能是中國試圖在國內外塑造對其太空計劃的正面形象，強調其技術的可靠性和未來潛力。由於目前缺乏參考報導的補充細節，無法進一步分析各方的具體立場或反應，但可以預見，這一議題將持續影響中美在太空領域的競爭格局。

technology.title: Anthropic to boost hiring in Europe after opening Milan office - Reuters
technology.summary: Anthropic to boost hiring in Europe after opening Milan office Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Anthropic to boost hiring in Europe after opening Milan office Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: Anthropic在米蘭開設辦公室後，宣布將加強在歐洲的招聘工作。這一舉措顯示出該公司對於擴展其在歐洲市場的業務及影響力的重視，並可能為當地科技人才提供更多的就業機會。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於人工智慧技術的公司，隨著全球對AI技術需求的增加，許多科技公司都在尋求擴展其業務範圍。歐洲市場對於AI的發展也越來越重視，許多國家在政策上支持科技創新，這為Anthropic的進一步擴展提供了良好的環境。此外，米蘭作為意大利的商業與科技中心，吸引了眾多科技企業的目光，成為其業務拓展的理想地點。
briefing.analysis: Anthropic在米蘭開設辦公室並加強招聘，顯示出其對於歐洲市場的重視，這可能是因應當地對於AI技術需求的增長。此舉不僅能夠幫助Anthropic吸引當地優秀的科技人才，還可能促進與當地企業及研究機構的合作，進一步提升其在歐洲的市場競爭力。此外，這一擴張策略也可能引發其他科技公司的關注，促使它們考慮在歐洲擴展業務，從而加劇市場競爭。未來，Anthropic的招聘成效及其在歐洲的業務發展將成為觀察的重點。

technology.title: China unveils AI system to automate satellite targeting and surveillance
technology.summary: The United States is reportedly bringing a powerful new weapon to the Iran war: large artificial intelligence (AI) models tasked with automating every stage of the targeting process, from satellite imagery analysis to final strike selection. But how these systems operate remains strictly classified, with incidents such as the February bombing of a primary school that killed more than 200 children in southern Iran raising public concerns about AI’s potential role in committing war crimes. Now...

briefing.news_focus: The United States is reportedly bringing a powerful new weapon to the Iran war: large artificial intelligence (AI) models tasked with automating every stage of the targeting process, from satellite imagery analysis to final strike selection. But how these systems operate remains strictly classified, with incidents such as the February bombing of a primary school that killed more than 200 children in southern Iran raising public concerns about AI’s potential role in committing war crimes. Now...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國最近推出了一種人工智慧（AI）系統，旨在自動化衛星目標鎖定和監視的過程。這一系統的開發背景與美國在伊朗戰爭中使用大型AI模型進行目標選擇的報導有關。儘管這些系統的具體運作方式仍然是機密，但有關AI可能參與戰爭罪行的擔憂日益增加，特別是在伊朗南部發生的造成200多名兒童死亡的轟炸事件後。
briefing.background: 隨著科技的進步，人工智慧在軍事領域的應用越來越廣泛。美國已經開始利用大型AI模型來自動化目標選擇過程，這一趨勢引發了對AI在戰爭中可能造成的倫理和法律問題的關注。特別是，AI系統在分析衛星影像和最終打擊選擇中的角色，讓人們擔心其可能導致的誤判和人道主義災難。這樣的背景下，中國的AI系統推出，可能是對美國軍事技術發展的一種回應，並顯示出全球軍事競爭中科技的關鍵角色。
briefing.analysis: 中國推出的AI系統可能旨在提升其在軍事監視和目標鎖定方面的能力，這與美國在相似領域的發展形成直接競爭。各方對於AI在軍事行動中的應用持有不同看法。支持者認為，AI能提高效率和準確性，減少人力資源的需求；而反對者則擔心這可能導致戰爭罪行的發生，尤其是在缺乏透明度和監管的情況下。此次事件也可能加劇國際間對於AI軍事應用的監管討論，促使各國重新評估其軍事策略和倫理標準。

politics.title: Friday briefing: ​What do the cuts in aid mean for the fight against Ebola in the DRC?
politics.summary: In today’s newsletter: As the virus spreads across borders, health workers warn that weakened global support is making a prolonged crisis more likely Ebola is spreading rapidly in parts of east Africa. The deadly disease, which kills around half of those it infects, is suspected to have claimed the lives of at least 240 people since the outbreak began in Ituri province in the Democratic Republic of the Congo earlier this month. Public health officials are scrambling to contain the virus in one of the toughest environments: Ituri province, the centre of the crisis , is a mining hub where thousands of people work in close proximity every day, and a conflict zone, with ongoing fighting between rebel groups. Medical facilities are modest, while waves of displaced people are being forced into overcrowded camps to escape fighting , making it even harder to control transmission. The virus has already spread to other regions in eastern DRC and the Ugandan capital Kampala. UK news | Britain risks a financial hit worth £125bn a year after a rise in the number of young people not in employment or education to more than 1 million. US-Israel-Iran | Donald Trump has circulated a draft peace agreement for the war with Iran among allies including Israel as both sides try to prevent fresh breaches of the ceasefire escalating out of control. UK politics | Andy Burnham has rolled back from his previous calls for ministers to scrap a restriction on immigrants claiming benefits as the Makerfield byelection places greater scrutiny on him. Ukraine | A Russian drone that was part of an overnight attack on Ukraine crashed into an apartment building in eastern Romania , injuring two people, authorities said, in what an official statement condemned as an “irresponsible escalation” by Moscow. Climate crisis | Abandoning net zero and drilling for more oil and gas would be a massive setback for the UK and would not help the economy, leading experts have said in response to Tony Blair. Continue reading...

The deadly disease, which kills around half of those it infects, is suspected to have claimed the lives of at least 240 people since the outbreak began in Ituri province in the Democratic Republic of the Congo earlier this month. Medical facilities are modest, while waves of displaced people are being forced into overcrowded camps to escape fighting , making it even harder to control transmission. briefing.news_focus_zh: 剛果民主共和國（DRC）伊圖里省的埃博拉疫情持續擴散，已造成至少240人死亡。公共衛生官員警告，全球援助減少將使危機持續惡化。該地區是礦業中心，人口密集且面臨持續的衝突，醫療設施有限，流離失所者被迫進入擁擠的難民營，進一步加大了病毒傳播的難度。隨著疫情向東部DRC及烏干達首都坎帕拉擴散，控制疫情的挑戰愈加艱巨。
briefing.background: 埃博拉病毒是一種致命的傳染病，感染者死亡率約50%。在剛果民主共和國，該病毒的爆發與當地的社會經濟環境密切相關。伊圖里省不僅是礦業重地，還是衝突頻繁的地區，這使得公共衛生工作面臨重大挑戰。隨著全球對抗疫情的支持減少，當地醫療資源的不足使得疫情控制變得更加困難。這一情況不僅影響了當地居民的健康，也可能對周邊國家造成威脅，因為病毒的跨境傳播風險增加。
briefing.analysis: 各方在應對埃博拉疫情的過程中，面臨著不同的利益和挑戰。當地政府與國際組織需要協調資源，以應對疫情擴散的威脅，但全球援助的減少使得這一過程更加艱難。公共衛生官員擔心，缺乏資金和支持將導致疫情持續惡化，進一步影響到地區穩定。參考報導中未提及的細節強調了當地的醫療設施不足和社會動盪，這些因素共同加劇了疫情的危機。隨著疫情的擴散，國際社會的關注和援助可能會重新評估，但目前的趨勢顯示，持續的支持仍然是關鍵。

supporting_titles: Russian drone launched against Ukraine crashes in Romania, injuring two
EU warns of Russian ‘trap’ over talks about Ukraine
supporting_summaries: The drone was tracked by radar in Romanian airspace and crashed onto the roof of a building in Galati

politics.title: Global Prosperity Summit 2026 reinforces Hong Kong’s strategic importance in advancing Apec cooperation and global governance
politics.summary: The Global Prosperity Summit 2026 (GPS 2026) highlighted Hong Kong’s expanding role in international and regional cooperation both within China’s Global Governance Initiative as well as Apec, ahead of a meeting of the bloc’s economic leaders in neighbouring Shenzhen later this year. The two-day event, which ran from May 19 to 20, brought together global leaders and renowned experts in Hong Kong to exchange insights on issues affecting the city’s future and global prosperity. Ambassador Han...

The two-day event, which ran from May 19 to 20, brought together global leaders and renowned experts in Hong Kong to exchange insights on issues affecting the city’s future and global prosperity. Ambassador Han...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 全球繁榮峰會2026於5月19日至20日在香港舉行，強調香港在促進亞太經合組織（APEC）合作及全球治理中的日益重要角色。此次為期兩天的活動聚集了全球領袖及專家，討論影響香港未來及全球繁榮的議題，並為即將在深圳召開的經濟領袖會議鋪路。
briefing.background: 香港在中國的全球治理倡議及亞太經合組織（APEC）中扮演著重要角色，尤其在促進貿易及經濟合作方面。隨著全球經濟形勢的變化，香港的地理位置及其作為國際金融中心的地位，使其在區域合作中愈發受到重視。GPS 2026的舉行，顯示出香港在推動這些合作方面的戰略意義，並可能影響未來的政策走向及經濟合作模式。
briefing.analysis: 此次全球繁榮峰會的成功舉辦，顯示出香港在國際舞台上的重要性，尤其是在APEC及中國的全球治理倡議中。各方利益關係交織，香港的商業界及政府希望透過此類活動提升其國際形象，吸引更多外資及合作機會。然而，隨著中國在中亞及其他地區擴大影響力，香港的角色可能面臨挑戰，特別是在地緣政治緊張的背景下。參考報導提到的中國在中亞的擴張，可能與香港的經濟策略相互影響，未來的發展需密切關注這些動態。

supporting_titles: China’s expanding footprint in Central Asia

politics.title: Bangladesh saves buffalo named ‘Donald Trump’ from Eid sacrifice
politics.summary: The animal’s former owner earlier said his brother named the buffalo ‘Donald Trump’ because of its unusual blond hair resembling that of the U.S. President

briefing.news_focus: The animal’s former owner earlier said his brother named the buffalo ‘Donald Trump’ because of its unusual blond hair resembling that of the U.S. President
briefing.news_focus_zh: 孟加拉國一頭名為‘唐納德·特朗普’的水牛因其獨特的金色毛發而受到關注，最終在政府的干預下被救下，免於在開齋節進行犧牲。這頭水牛的前主人表示，因為其毛色與美國總統相似而命名。政府的介入是基於對公眾關注的安全考量。
briefing.background: 在孟加拉國，開齋節（Eid al-Adha）是重要的宗教節日，通常會進行牲畜的犧牲儀式。水牛在這一儀式中扮演著重要角色，特別是在農村地區，這種傳統深植於文化之中。然而，隨著社交媒體的興起，動物權益問題及公眾對特定動物的關注也日益增加。這頭名為‘唐納德·特朗普’的水牛因其稀有的金色毛發而受到特別關注，並引發了廣泛的討論，最終促使政府介入以避免潛在的社會動盪。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了孟加拉國在傳統與現代觀念之間的張力。一方面，開齋節的傳統儀式受到尊重，另一方面，公眾對動物權益的關注日益增加。政府的介入反映了對社會穩定的重視，尤其是在這頭水牛引發的廣泛關注之後。根據參考報導，這頭水牛的體重達700公斤，已經被出售進行儀式，但因公眾的強烈反應，當局選擇了介入。此外，這一事件也引發了對動物命名的討論，是否應該以名人來命名動物，並可能影響其命運。各方對於傳統與現代價值觀的看法存在差異，未來可能會出現更多類似的案例。

supporting_titles: Blond Bangladeshi buffalo nicknamed ‘Donald Trump’ saved from Eid sacrifice
supporting_summaries: Rare albino buffalo spared due to security concerns over unusual level of public interest in 700kg animal A rare albino buffalo in Bangladesh nicknamed “Donald Trump” for its distinctive blond tuft has been spared from Eid al-Adha sacrifice after a last-minute government intervention, according to a home ministry official. The nearly 700kg (1,543lb) animal had already been sold for ritual slaughter when authorities stepped in, citing security concerns after a surge of public interest before Thursday’s festival. Continue reading...

economy.title: ‘It feels unfair’: the Britons struggling to get a mortgage since Iran war began
economy.summary: Whether first-time buyers, in between homes or refixing, people tell of impact of higher mortgage rates on housing Prospects of cuts in UK interest rates in 2026, which were widely expected at the start of the year, were rapidly extinguished when the Iran war started at the end of February. The renewed threat of inflation means the Bank of England is now expected to raise rates at least once this year, with mortgage costs staying higher for longer. The boss of Britain’s largest housebuilder said on Thursday it was the most challenging time to be a first-time buyer since the 2008 financial crisis. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Whether first-time buyers, in between homes or refixing, people tell of impact of higher mortgage rates on housing Prospects of cuts in UK interest rates in 2026, which were widely expected at the start of the year, were rapidly extinguished when the Iran war started at the end of February. The renewed threat of inflation means the Bank of England is now expected to raise rates at least once this year, with mortgage costs staying higher for longer. The boss of Britain’s largest housebuilder said on Thursday it was the most challenging time to be a first-time buyer since the 2008 financial crisis. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著伊朗戰爭的爆發，英國的抵押貸款市場受到重大影響。預期中的利率減少在2026年幾乎被排除，因為通脹威脅再度上升，英格蘭銀行可能在今年內至少再提高一次利率，導致抵押貸款成本將長期保持在高位。英國最大房屋建設公司的負責人表示，這是自2008年金融危機以來，首次購房者面臨的最具挑戰性的時期。
briefing.background: 自2023年2月底以來，伊朗戰爭的爆發對全球經濟產生了深遠影響，特別是在能源市場。英國的利率政策本來預期會在2026年進行調整，但隨著通脹壓力的上升，英格蘭銀行的政策走向發生了變化。高抵押貸款利率使得首次購房者面臨更大的財務壓力，尤其是在房價高企的背景下。這一情況使得英國的房地產市場進一步承壓，並影響了整體經濟復甦的步伐。
briefing.analysis: 英國的抵押貸款市場面臨的挑戰主要源於高利率和不穩定的經濟環境。根據《The Guardian》的報導，首次購房者的困境在於高昂的貸款成本和不確定的市場前景，這使得他們在購房過程中感到不公平。而《Nikkei Asia》提到的日本原油進口減少50%的情況，則突顯了中東地區對能源的依賴，這可能進一步影響全球能源價格，間接影響英國的經濟狀況。《The Economist》則指出，隨著可再生能源的吸引力上升，政府可能會加大對綠色能源的投資，以應對能源危機。這些報導共同反映出，全球經濟的動盪和能源市場的變化將持續影響英國的抵押貸款市場及其未來發展。

supporting_titles: Japan's crude imports plunge 50% since Iran war, exposing Mideast reliance
Renewables are shining. The Iran war amplifies their appeal
supporting_summaries: Two new reports are a must-read of energy-starved governments

economy.title: US inflation rose at fastest pace in three years in April as Iran war hikes up prices
economy.summary: Americans are growing frustrated with Trump’s handling of the economy as cost of living soars ahead of midterms US inflation increased at its fastest pace in three years in April, driven by higher energy prices amid the war with Iran, and cementing economists’ views that the Federal Reserve could hold interest rates unchanged well into next year. Surging price pressures are eroding household income and could restrain consumer spending and economic growth this quarter. Income at the disposal of households after adjusting for inflation dropped for a third straight month in April, other data showed on Thursday. Given the soaring cost of living, Americans are growing frustrated with Donald Trump’s handling of the economy. A Reuters/Ipsos survey last week showed the president’s approval rating fell to nearly its lowest level since he returned to the White House, hit by a drop in support among Republicans. Trump won the 2024 presidential election in large part because of his promise to lower inflation. Continue reading...

A Reuters/Ipsos survey last week showed the president’s approval rating fell to nearly its lowest level since he returned to the White House, hit by a drop in support among Republicans. Trump won the 2024 presidential election in large part because of his promise to lower inflation. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國四月份的通貨膨脹率以三年來最快的速度上升，主要受到伊朗戰爭推高能源價格的影響。這一情況使得經濟學家認為美國聯邦儲備系統可能會在明年保持利率不變。家庭可支配收入在調整通脹後連續第三個月下降，這加劇了美國民眾對特朗普經濟政策的不滿，尤其是在即將到來的中期選舉前。最近的民調顯示，特朗普的支持率降至自他回到白宮以來的最低點。
briefing.background: 美國的通脹問題在近年來持續受到關注，尤其是隨著全球能源價格的波動和地緣政治緊張局勢的升高，通脹壓力進一步加劇。伊朗戰爭的影響使得能源價格上漲，進一步推高了生活成本，這對家庭的可支配收入造成了影響。根據數據顯示，家庭可支配收入在調整通脹後的下降，反映出消費者的購買力受到侵蝕，可能會對經濟增長造成壓力。這一背景使得美國聯邦儲備系統在制定貨幣政策時面臨更大的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 各方對於通脹上升的反應不一。特朗普政府面臨著民眾對經濟管理的不滿，尤其是在他曾承諾降低通脹的背景下，這可能影響其在2024年選舉中的競選策略。根據參考報導，聯邦儲備系統在面對這種通脹壓力時，可能會考慮保持利率不變，以避免進一步抑制經濟增長。這與《經濟學人》的報導相呼應，後者指出美國債券持有者對通脹的擔憂加劇，顯示出市場對未來經濟政策的不安。隨著通脹持續上升，消費者支出可能會受到限制，進一步影響經濟增長的前景。

economy.title: Futu first-quarter profit down 61% following US$272 million regulatory fine
economy.summary: Futu Holdings disclosed that its mainland Chinese clients account for about one-fifth of its assets and revenue after it reported a 61.2 per cent drop in first-quarter profit, as analysts warned Beijing’s latest crackdown on cross-border trading will weigh on earnings growth in the near term. The Nasdaq-listed Chinese online brokerage reported net profit of HK$831 million (US$106 million) in the three months ended March 31, down from HK$2.15 billion a year earlier, after booking a 1.85 billion...

briefing.news_focus: Futu Holdings disclosed that its mainland Chinese clients account for about one-fifth of its assets and revenue after it reported a 61.2 per cent drop in first-quarter profit, as analysts warned Beijing’s latest crackdown on cross-border trading will weigh on earnings growth in the near term. The Nasdaq-listed Chinese online brokerage reported net profit of HK$831 million (US$106 million) in the three months ended March 31, down from HK$2.15 billion a year earlier, after booking a 1.85 billion...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Futu Holdings 公布其第一季淨利潤下降61.2%，報告顯示淨利潤為8.31億港元（約1.06億美元），較去年同期的21.5億港元大幅減少。此一下降主要受到27.2億美元的監管罰款影響，分析師警告北京對跨境交易的最新打擊將在短期內壓制其收益增長。Futu 透露其來自中國大陸的客戶佔其資產和收入的約五分之一。
briefing.background: Futu Holdings 是一家在納斯達克上市的中國在線經紀公司，專注於提供投資服務。近期，中國政府加強了對跨境交易的監管，這對許多金融科技公司造成了影響。Futu 的業務模式依賴於吸引中國大陸客戶進行海外投資，而這一政策的變化可能使其未來的增長潛力受到限制。此外，監管罰款的增加也反映出中國政府對金融市場的嚴格監管態度，這可能會影響整個行業的運作環境。
briefing.analysis: Futu Holdings 的利潤大幅下降顯示出其在當前監管環境下的脆弱性。公司面臨的27.2億美元罰款不僅影響了其短期財務表現，也可能對其長期發展構成挑戰。分析師指出，隨著中國政府對跨境交易的打壓，Futu 可能需要重新評估其業務策略，以適應新的市場環境。儘管來自中國大陸的客戶仍占其收入的一部分，但未來的增長可能會受到政策限制的影響，這使得投資者對其未來表現持謹慎態度。整體而言，Futu 的情況反映出在嚴格的監管背景下，金融科技公司需要更靈活的應對策略以維持競爭力。
